Aries.personality: Bold, energetic, initiator, competitive. Natural-born leader with a pioneering spirit.
Aries.challenges: Impatient, impulsive, short-tempered, can be aggressive.

Taurus.personality: Reliable, grounded, loyal, beauty-loving. Values stability and comfort above all.

Gemini.personality: Curious, expressive, adaptable, witty. The social butterfly of the zodiac.

Cancer.personality: Intuitive, emotional, nurturing, protective. Deeply connected to home and family.
Cancer.strengths: Loyalty, empathy, imagination, tenacity, emotional depth.

Leo.personality: Confident, dramatic, generous, warm-hearted. Born to shine and lead with charisma.
Leo.challenges: Arrogance, stubbornness, need for attention, inflexibility.

Virgo.personality: Analytical, practical, detail-oriented, helpful. The perfectionist who serves with precision.
Virgo.strengths: Attention to detail, reliability, analytical mind, hard-working.

Libra.personality: Diplomatic, charming, balanced, fair-minded. Seeks harmony and justice in all things.
Libra.strengths: Cooperation, diplomacy, grace, fairness, social skills.
Libra.challenges: Indecisiveness, avoidance of conflict, people-pleasing, self-pity.

Scorpio.personality: Intense, passionate, resourceful, magnetic. The most powerful and transformative sign.

Sagittarius.personality: Adventurous, optimistic, philosophical, freedom-loving. The explorer and truth-seeker.
Sagittarius.strengths: Generosity, idealism, humor, adventurous spirit, honesty.

Capricorn.personality: Disciplined, ambitious, responsible, practical. The master planner who builds empires.

Aquarius.personality: Progressive, innovative, humanitarian, independent. The visionary who thinks ahead of their time.
Aquarius.strengths: Originality, independence, humanitarian spirit, intellectual depth.

Pisces.personality: Compassionate, artistic, intuitive, dreamy. The most spiritually evolved sign of the zodiac.
Pisces.strengths: Compassion, artistic talent, intuition, wisdom, gentleness.
